results.rendered_html: vi-śe˚ṣokti f. ‘mention of difference’, N. of a figure of speech (in which the excellence of a thing is implied by comparing it to some highly prized object, yet mentioning the difference, e.g. dyūtaṃnāma puruṣasyāsiMhAsanaM rAjyam, ‘truly gambling is a man's throneless kingdom’,  Mṛcch. ii, 6/7 ),  Vām. iv, 3, 23  (cf.  Kāvyād. ii, 323  &c.)

results.rendered_html: viśeṣokti (viśeṣa + u˚) f. eine best. Redefigur: Hervorhebung der Verschiedenheit zweier im Uebrigen einander ähnlicher Dinge  SĀH. D. 452 . 106,11 .  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 208,b,21 .  KUVALAY. 98,a .
